title: cola acuminata var. grandiflora
intro: Cola acuminata var. grandiflora, also known as the kola nut tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Cola acuminata var. grandiflora include its ability to stimulate the nervous system, act as a diuretic, and exhibit analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and fatigue. Herbal preparations of Cola acuminata var. grandiflora are typically made into tea or capsules, and are also used in traditional medicine in various forms, such as infusions and decoctions.
